summary: This proposal defines complementary JSON-RPC methods to [EIP-5792's `wallet_sendCalls`](./eip-5792.md) to enable an Application to sign over a call bundle (instead of the Wallet). Methods defined in this proposal are purposed for the Application to sign over `calls` and submit them to the Wallet with an accompanying signature. This is in contrast to `wallet_sendCalls`, where a Wallet itself signs over the call bundle.
title: Wallet Call Preparation API
